notes: Kairos is a CNCF Sandbox project: an immutable Linux meta-distribution for building bootable edge Kubernetes OS images, used alongside Talos and Flatcar in edge fleets. The name is Ancient Greek καιρός, "the opportune moment", and the 'ai' digraph is /aɪ/ with stress on the first syllable: KYE-ross. Readers coming to it cold often say "KAY-ross" or "kah-ee-ROSS", both of which are wrong; a valid variant ends in -rohs.
